plugins.name: reading-pipeline
plugins.description: Research topics, summarize papers, convert to EPUB/KEPUB, and sync to Kobo or reMarkable via Google Drive.

plugins.name: english-survival-lessons
plugins.description: Generate a 20-day functional survival English course — produces a master itinerary and per-day teacher plans, kid-facing readings and notes, audio scripts, and three video scripts.

plugins.name: job-search
plugins.description: Job-search toolkit: search the web for roles matching your preferences, capture job postings to markdown, scrape LinkedIn profiles, and get resume-tailoring recommendations.
